validation.password_min: The password must be at least 8 characters.

login.title: Sign in
login.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

two_factor.title: Two-factor verification
two_factor.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

register.title: Create an account
register.name: First name
register.disabled_text: This instance does not allow new registrations. Contact the administrator.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: We will send a password reset link to your e-mail.
forgot.sent: If the address exists, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.success: Password changed. You can sign in now.
reset.invalid_text: This password reset link is incomplete or expired.

google.title: Signing in with Google
google.error: Could not complete the Google sign-in.
google.missing_code: The sign-in response is missing the authorization code.

verify_email.title: E-mail verification
verify_email.success_text: Your e-mail address has been successfully verified.
verify_email.error_text: This e-mail verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from your account settings.

verify_banner.text: Verify your e-mail address so we can be sure important notifications reach you.
